understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level (BP35 and onward) without dying, progressing level by level until the game is won. Dying happens primarily by landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action: `MOVE_LEFT` or `MOVE_RIGHT` moves one tile horizontally, then gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (`o`/`m`/`w`), hit spikes (instant loss), or reach the goal `+`. `CLICK` targets a specific coordinate to remove a breakable/clickable block (`x`) and does not move the player; it is used to open/clear fall paths. `UNDO` reverts the previous action. Levels allow 2 attempts, each with up to 50 turns.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level (BP35 and onward) without dying, progressing level by level until the game is won. Dying happens primarily by landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action: `MOVE_LEFT` or `MOVE_RIGHT` moves one tile horizontally, then gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (`o`/`m`/`w`), hit spikes (instant loss), or reach the goal `+`. `CLICK` targets a specific coordinate to remove a breakable/clickable block (`x`) and does not move the player; it is used to open/clear fall paths. `UNDO` reverts the previous action. Levels allow 2 attempts, each with up to 50 turns.
